pages.title: OKX – Buy Bitcoin & Crypto | Crypto Exchange, App
pages.content:
# OKX – Buy Bitcoin & Crypto | Crypto Exchange, App

> OKX - Buy BTC, ETH, XRP and more on OKX, a leading crypto exchange. Register now and experience the future of finance.

## Trading Options

- [Buy and Sell](https://www.okx.com/buy-crypto): Purchase and sell cryptocurrencies using various payment methods.
- [P2P Trading](https://www.okx.com/p2p/express): Engage in peer-to-peer crypto trading.
- [USDT/CNY P2P Trading](https://www.okx.com/p2p-markets/cny/buy-usdt): Trade CNY to USDT stablecoin with 0 fees.
- [USDT/VND P2P Trading](https://www.okx.com/p2p-markets/vnd/buy-usdt): Trade VND to USDT stablecoin with 0 fees.
- [Markets](https://www.okx.com/markets/prices): Access real-time cryptocurrency prices and comprehensive market data.
- [Opportunities](https://www.okx.com/markets/explore): Discover trending, new, and popular cryptocurrencies.
- [Convert](https://www.okx.com/trade-convert): Execute instant cryptocurrency conversions.
- [Spot Trading](https://www.okx.com/trade-spot): Trade cryptocurrencies on the spot market.
- [Futures](https://www.okx.com/trade-swap): Trade perpetual cryptocurrency futures contracts.
- [Options](https://www.okx.com/trade-option-chain): Buy and sell cryptocurrency options contracts.
- [Pre-market Futures](https://www.okx.com/pre-market): You can trade new crypto before their official launch. Get early access to top-tier crypto with 2x leverage.
- [Trading Bots](https://www.okx.com/trading-bot): Utilize automated bots to execute various trading strategies.

## Crypto Price

- [All Cryptocurrencies](https://www.okx.com/price.md): A comprehensive list cryptocurrencies.
- [Bitcoin Price](https://www.okx.com/price/bitcoin-btc.md): Live price, chart, market cap, and market performance data for Bitcoin.
- [Ethereum Price](https://www.okx.com/price/ethereum-eth.md): Live price, chart, market cap, and market performance data for Ethereum.
- [Solana Price](https://www.okx.com/price/solana-sol.md): Live price, chart, market cap, and market performance data for Solana.

## Crypto Price Prediction

- [General Price Prediction](https://www.okx.com/price-prediction): Crypto price predictions, forecasts and analyses.
- [Bitcoin Price Prediction](https://www.okx.com/price-prediction/bitcoin-btc): Price predictions and future forecasts for Bitcoin.
- [Ethereum Price Prediction](https://www.okx.com/price-prediction/ethereum-eth): Price predictions and future forecasts for Ethereum.
- [Solana Price Prediction](https://www.okx.com/price-prediction/solana-sol): Price predictions and future forecasts for Solana.

## Crypto Spot Trading

- [BTC/USDC Spot Trading](https://www.okx.com/trade-spot/btc-usdc): Trade Bitcoin to USDC stablecoin instantly.
- [BTC/USDT Spot Trading](https://www.okx.com/trade-spot/btc-usdt): Trade Bitcoin to USDT stablecoin instantly.
- [ETH/USDT Spot Trading](https://www.okx.com/trade-spot/eth-usdt): Trade Ethereum to USDT stablecoin instantly.
- [ETH/USDC Spot Trading](https://www.okx.com/trade-spot/eth-usdc): Trade Ethereum to USDC stablecoin instantly.
- [SOL/USDT Spot Trading](https://www.okx.com/trade-spot/sol-usdt): Trade Solana to USDT stablecoin instantly.
- [SOL/USDC Spot Trading](https://www.okx.com/trade-spot/sol-usdc): Trade Solana to USDC stablecoin instantly.

## Crypto Futures Trading

- [BTC/USDT Futures Trading](https://www.okx.com/trade-swap/btc-usdt-swap): Trade Bitcoin perpetual futures with USDT margin.
- [ETH/USDT Futures Trading](https://www.okx.com/trade-swap/eth-usdt-swap): Trade Ethereum perpetual futures with USDT margin.
- [SOL/USDT Futures Trading](https://www.okx.com/trade-swap/sol-usdt-swap): Trade Solana perpetual futures with USDT margin.

## Buy Crypto

- [Buy Bitcoin (BTC)](https://www.okx.com/buy-btc): Purchase Bitcoin using multiple payment methods.
- [Buy Ethereum (ETH)](https://www.okx.com/buy-eth): Purchase Ethereum using multiple payment methods.
- [Buy Solana (SOL)](https://www.okx.com/buy-sol): Purchase Solana using multiple payment methods.

## Crypto Calculator

- [Convert BTC to USD](https://www.okx.com/convert/btc-to-usd.md): Calculate Bitcoin value in USD.
- [Convert ETH to USD](https://www.okx.com/convert/eth-to-usd.md): Calculate Ethereum value in USD.
- [Convert SOL to USD](https://www.okx.com/convert/sol-to-usd.md): Calculate Solana value in USD.

## Earning Opportunities

- [Earn](https://www.okx.com/earn): Explore a variety of products to grow your crypto holdings.
- [Simple Earn](https://www.okx.com/earn/simple-earn): Earn rewards on your crypto with flexible and fixed-term staking options.
- [On-chain Earn](https://www.okx.com/earn/onchain-earn): Participate in DeFi protocols directly to earn yields.
- [Dual Investment](https://www.okx.com/earn/dual): Subscribe to high-yield products based on market volatility.
- [Loan](https://www.okx.com/loan): Borrow funds using your crypto assets as collateral.

## Institutional Services

- [Jumpstart](https://www.okx.com/jumpstart): Participate in the launch of new crypto projects and tokens.
- [OKX Institutional](https://www.okx.com/institutional): Access tailored trading solutions and services for institutions.
- [Liquid Marketplace](https://www.okx.com/liquid-marketplace): An OTC and derivatives liquidity network for institutional-sized trades.
- [APIs](https://www.okx.com/okx-api): Integrate with the OKX trading engine using their powerful API.
- [Agent Trade Kit](https://www.okx.com/agent-tradekit): A developer toolkit for building AI agents with integrated OKX crypto trading capabilities.
- [Crypto Broker Program](https://www.okx.com/broker/home): Partner with OKX to earn commissions as a broker.
- [Historical Market Data](https://www.okx.com/historical-data): Download historical market data for backtesting and analysis.
- [Institutional Insights](https://www.okx.com/landingpage/institutionalinsights): Read research reports and analysis for the institutional market.

## Learning and Support

- [Learn](https://www.okx.com/learn): An educational hub with articles and tutorials on crypto and trading.
- [Learn](https://www.okx.com/learn.md): Markdown version, An educational hub with articles and tutorials on crypto and trading.
- [Security of Funds](https://www.okx.com/wallet-security): Information on the security measures protecting user funds.
- [Status](https://www.okx.com/status): View the real-time operational status of the OKX platform.
- [Proof of Reserves](https://www.okx.com/proof-of-reserves): Verify the exchange's asset holdings through regular audits.
- [OKX Protect](https://www.okx.com/protect): Learn about the comprehensive security features protecting your assets.

## Community and Engagement

- [Referral](https://www.okx.com/referral): Invite friends to OKX and earn rewards.
- [Affiliates](https://www.okx.com/affiliates): Join the OKX affiliate program to earn commissions.
- [OKX Ventures](https://www.okx.com/ventures): The investment arm of OKX, focused on funding innovative Web3 projects.

## Additional Resources

- [About OKX](https://www.okx.com/about.md): Markdown version, learn about OKX's mission, leadership, and company background.
- [Listing Application](https://www.okx.com/token-listing-apply): Submit an application to have a token listed on the exchange.
- [Support Center](https://www.okx.com/help): Access help articles, FAQs, and contact support.
- [Contact Us](https://www.okx.com/contact-us): Get in touch with OKX customer support, business, and media teams.
- [Connect with OKX](https://www.okx.com/community): Join the official OKX community channels.

## Getting Started

- [Try OKX](https://www.okx.com/account/register): Create a new OKX account to start trading.
- [How to Buy Crypto](https://www.okx.com/how-to-buy): A general guide on how to purchase cryptocurrencies.
- [How to Buy Bitcoin](https://www.okx.com/how-to-buy/bitcoin-btc): A step-by-step guide on how to purchase Bitcoin (BTC).
- [How to Buy Ethereum](https://www.okx.com/how-to-buy/ethereum-eth): A step-by-step guide on how to purchase Ethereum (ETH).
- [How to Buy Solana](https://www.okx.com/how-to-buy/solana-sol): A step-by-step guide on how to purchase Solana (SOL).

## Legal and Compliance

- [Terms of Service](https://www.okx.com/help/terms-of-service): The user agreement for using OKX services.
- [Privacy Notice](https://www.okx.com/help/privacy-policy-statement): Details on how user data is collected and used.
- [Disclosures](https://www.okx.com/help/risk-compliance-disclosure): Important risk and compliance information.
- [Whistleblower Notice](https://www.okx.com/help/whistleblower-notice): Procedures for reporting misconduct.
- [Law Enforcement](https://www.okx.com/help/okx-law-enforcement-request-guide): A guide for law enforcement agencies requesting information.

## Mobile and Accessibility

- [OKX App](https://www.okx.com/download): Download the official crypto mobile app for iOS and Android.
